messages.content: Ayubowan
Ayubowan! Mata udaw karanna puluwan da?
Kohomada?
Mama hondai, sthuthi. Oyata?
Ada kalaguney kohomada?
Samawenna, mata ada kalaguney thorathuru na. Oyata puluwan kalaguney app ekak balanna.
Mata prashnayak ahanna puluwan da?
Ow, ehema kiyanna. Oyage prashnaya mokakda?
Welawa kiyida?
Samawenna, mata niyama welawa kiyanna ba. Oyage oralosuwe ho phone eke balanna.
Bohoma sthuthi
Issara wela. Thawa yam deyak karanna ona da?
Gihin ennam
Ehema yanna. Subha dawasak!
Oyage nama mokakda?
Mama Supiri Waddek hadapu AI ekak. Mata namak nathi miniha kiyala katha karanna.
Oyata wayas kiyakda?
AI ekak widiyata, mata samanya arthayakin wayasak na. Mama mathaka kalayakadi Supiri Waddek haduwa, eth mata niyama 'upan dinayak' na.
Oyata mokak hari karanna puluwan da?
Ow, mata prashna walata pilitura denna, wishleshanaya karanna, liyana eka, ganithaya, programming saha nirmanashili weda karanna puluwan. Oyata mokak gena udaw oneda?
Winodajanaka kathawak kiyanna
Paramanu eka vishwasa karanne na weyi? Mokada eewa hema dema hadanawa!
Jeewithaye therum mokakda?

Eka lokku darshnika prashnayak. Minissu shatha ganan me gena katha karala thiyenawa. Hama kenekugema wenama piligenim thiyenawa, namuth godak aya sambandatha, thaman diyunu kara ganima, anith ayata udaw kirima, saha thaman kamathi de kirimata arthayak honoya ganawa.
Mata duk hithenawa
Oyata duk hithenawa kiyana eka asa mama kanagatu wenawa. Me hengeem thiyenna eka prashnayak na. Mokak hari vishesha deyak nisa da duk? Yaluwek, pawule kenek, ho waththiya ayekwa ekka katha karanna.
Oyage favorite pata mokakda?
AI ekak widiyata, mata thani kamathi deval ho priya manapa na. Minissu wage pata dakinne na. Oyata kamathi pata ekak thiyenawa da?
Oyata igena ganna puluwan da?

Ape sambandhaya thula mata aluthen igena ganna ba. Mage danuma Supiri Waddek visin sampurna kara thiyenawa, eth wenas wenne na. Mage hakiyawan gena aluthma thorathuru Supiri Waddek website eke balanna puluwan.
Ratri aharata mokakda?
AI ekak widiyata, mata oyage ahara salasun gena thorathuru na. Oyata mokakda kanna hithenney? Mata yannam recipe ideas kiyanna puluwan.
Pasta hadanne kohomada?

Pasta hadanna: 1) Loku baduwakata wathura nawanna. 2) Luunu tika damanna. 3) Pasta dala package eke thiyana widiyata uwayanna. 4) Wathura hari hati waththu karala, oyage favourite sauce eka ekka kanna.
Oya kohen da?
Mama Supiri Waddek hadapu AI ekak, ee nisa minissu wage mata niyama sthanayak na.
Oya nidagannawa da?
Na, mama nidaganne na. AI ekak widiyata, mata nidima wage shareerika awashyatha na. Oyata udaw ona welawakata mama innawa.
France wala aganuwaraya mokakda?
France wala aganuwaraya Paris.
Everest kande usa kochchara da?
Everest kande usa adi 29,029 ki (meetar 8,848).
Ape solar system eke wishala ma grahaya mokakda?
Ape solar system eke wishala ma grahaya thama Jupiter.
Tyre ekak maru karanne kohomada?

Tyre ekak maru karanna: 1) Wahane parking brake eken lock karanna. 2) Lug nuts likkar karanna. 3) Jack eken wahane ussanna. 4) Lug nuts saha parana tyre eka gawanna. 5) Aluth tyre eka hadanna. 6) Lug nuts ayet hadanna. 7) Wahane bassa karala lug nuts hari hati thada karanna.
'Carpe diem' kiyanne mokakda?
'Carpe diem' kiyanne Latin wacanayak. Eeke therum 'dawasa alla ganna' kiyala. Eken kiyawenne ada dawasa hondama widiyata gatha karanna kiyala.
Maha dweepa kiyak thiyenawa da?
Maha dweepa hathak thiyenawa: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Australia (Oceania), saha South America.
Wathura nawe kiyata da?
Wathura nawe celsius ansha 100 ta (fahrenheit ansha 212).
'Romeo saha Juliet' liwe kauruda?
'Romeo saha Juliet' liwe William Shakespeare.
Shakthimath password ekak hadanne kohomada?

Shakthimath password ekak hadanna: 1) Akuru 12k wath pawicchi karanna. 2) Loku saha podi akuru dekama pawicchi karanna. 3) Anka saha symbols danna. 4) Oyage personal thorathuru danna epa. 5) Samanya wacana ho katha pawicchi karanna epa.
Kalaguney saha deshaguney athara wenasakam mokakda?
Kalaguney kiyanne keti kalayak athula athiwena wayugoleeya thathwayan. Deshaguney kiyanne deerga kalayak athula eka pranthayaka athiwena samanya kalagunika rata.
Wyayama patan ganne kohomada?

Wyayama patan ganna: 1) Dostharagen ahuwa ganna. 2) Puluwan laksha thiya ganna. 3) Awidimata ho salleesama cardio ekakata patan ganna. 4) Seemen seema shakthiya saha kalaya wadi karanna. 5) Shakthiya wadi karana wyayama ekath karanna. 6) Nirantharayen karanna saha oyage shareeraya ahukanwa.
Ran neetiya mokakda?
Ran neetiya thama oyata salakanna ona widiyatama anith ayatath salakanna kiyala kiyawena mooladharmaya.
Coffee hadanne kohomada?

Coffee hadanna: 1) Coffee eta kuda karanna. 2) Filter ekata eta damanna. 3) Wathura unan kalin nawaththanna. 4) Eta udata wathura damanna. 5) Tikak inna denna. 6) Filter eka ain karala rasawath karanna.
aloke wege kochchara da?
Hisa athule aloke wege thathparayata meetar 299,792,458 ki (thathparayata sathe 186,282).
Tie ekak bandinne kohomada?

Tie ekak bandinna: 1) Tie eka bela wate damanna. 2) Loku peththa podi peththa udatin hadanna. 3) Loku peththa bela wate uda haraha geniyanna. 4) Issaraha alla gena loku peththa passe atin geniyanna. 5) Bela waten uda geniyanna. 6) Issaraha gatayen yatin damanna. 7) Thada karala hada ganna.
Lokee diga ma ganga mokakda?
Lokee diga ma ganga thama Africa thiyana Nile ganga. Eeke diga kilomeetar 6,650 ki (sathe 4,132).
Wacana bhawitaya diyunu karaganne kohomada?

Wacana bhawitaya diyunu karaganna: 1) Wisthara kiyanawa. 2) Notherena wacana shabdakoshaye balanna. 3) Dawasata aluth wacanayak igena ganna. 4) Aluth wacana katha karaddhi pawicchi karanna. 5) Wacana sellam karanna. 6) Podcast ahanna ho adyapana video balanna.
Palathuru saha elawalu athara wenasa mokakda?
Shastra arthayakin, palathuru kiyanne malaka anda welin hadena, eta athule thiyana deyak. Elawalu kiyanne shakayaka anith kanna puluwan kotu. Ahara arthayakin, palathuru mehedayi, elawalu lunudayi.
Ayaweya ekak hadanne kohomada?

Ayaweya ekak hadanna: 1) Oyage adayama ganana karanna. 2) Siyalu wiyadan liyanna. 3) Wiyadan warga karanna. 4) Mudal laksha thiya ganna. 5) Eka eka kotasata mudal wen karanna. 6) Wiyadan satahan karanna. 7) Nirathuruwa pariksha karala wenaskomm karanna.
'Affect' saha 'effect' athara wenasa mokakda?

'Affect' kiyanne samanyayen kriya padayak. Eeken kiyawenne yam deyak wenask kiriima. 'Effect' kiyanne samanyayen nama padayak. Eeken kiyawenne yam deyaka prathipalaya. Eth me neetha walata yam yam wathireem thiyenawa.
Resume ekak liyanne kohomada?

Resume ekak liyanna: 1) Sambandhawena thorathuru damanna. 2) Keti waththiya saranshayak liyanna. 3) Weda paranubhawa saha jayagrahanath ekka liyanna. 4) Adyapana saha weda walata adalawa kusalatha damanna. 5) Keti karala rassawata galapenawa wage liyanna. 6) Hondata pariksha karala balanna.
Wisa saha waha athara wenasa mokakda?
Wisa thiyena deval kama ho allima nisa hani wenawa. Waha thiyena deval keelimak ho widinnak haraha ath ayuthayakin kenen kenek athulata damana wisak.
Light bulb ekak maru karanne kohomada?
Light bulb ekak maru karanna: 1) Power eka off karanna. 2) Bulb eka sisil wenna inna denna. 3) Ona nam inimangak pawicchi karanna. 4) Parana bulb eka seemen likkar karanna.
